MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kenneth Tsang appeared for Mr. O'Neill on behalf of Clifford Guidry. Mark Rubke for Kate Rogers (Respondent).

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Stipulation
Off Calendar Mar-20-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mark Rubke for Kate Rogers.
Mr. Rubke informed the court that the inventory has been filed, the Court questioned why the other counsel was not present today.
The matter was taken under submission. The Court will make a ruling and notify counsel.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, Bailiff: Deputy Handa.

Petition To Recover Assets Belonging To The Estate
Off Calendar Mar-04-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mary O'Neill for and with petitioner Clifford Guidry. Mark Rubke for and with respondent Kate Rogers.

The Court read both trial briefs and found no factual issues. Mr. Rubke stated that he was not contesting any factual issues. The Court agreed with Mr. Rubke in regards to one half of the property belonging to the estate. Ms. O'Neill agreed, and stated that the issue becomes wrongful withholding. The Court stated that each person was entitled to do as he or she wishes with their half of the property and that some type of an accounting should be done from the date of death. The Court stated that this matter should be resolved by stipulation and requested each party to submit a brief regarding double damages and attorney's fees which are due on January 18th. The Court will take the matter under submission on that date. The parties were directed to stipulate as to the estate on half interest, to figure out the fair rental value, and to determine if the amount of the loan is equal to one half of the property. The matter was set for status of the stipulation on February 20, 2008. The parties are not required to appear on that date.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition To Recover Assets Belonging To The Estate
Off Calendar Sep-25-2007 Continued To Jan-04-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Kenneth Tsang specially appearing for Mary O'Neill. Mark Rubke appearing for and with Kate Rogers, respondent. Mediation did not resolve the issues. Mr. Rubke requested to have a hearing date set. Hearing will take half day. Matter is continued to 1/4/08 at 9am for evidentiary hearing before Judge Dearman. If Judge Dearman is not available on that date, counsel will be notified.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Peggy Tsujimoto CSR# 5229. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Lewis.

Off Calendar Jun-26-2007 Continued To Aug-14-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Kenneth Tsang specially appearing for Mary O'Neill. Mark Rubke appearing for respondent Kate Rogers. Both counsel agreed to mediation. Court is referring this matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Order signed. Mediation must be completed not later than 8/7. Matter is continued to 8/14 for status.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Rob Harris.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Gena Eales CSR# 9176. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Rob Harris.

Petition To Recover Assets Belonging To The Estate
Off Calendar May-15-2007 Continued To Jun-19-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Kenneth Tsang specially appearing for Mary O'Neill for administrator. The administrator Clifford Guidry is in court and Earl Guidry is also in court. Mark Rubke appearing for Kate Rogers. Mr. Rubke is just retained. He is requesting for continuance to respond. He agreed to waive the 30 day notice to Ms. Rogers. Mr. Tsang agreed to the continuance. Matter is continued to 6/19. Court won't require re-notice to Ms. Rogers.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Helen Soret-Matley CSR# 9225. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: R. Guitron.
